headline: RBC Capital Initiates Coverage On Molina Healthcare with Sector Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $216
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Ben Hendrix   initiates coverage on Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) with a Sector Perform rating and announces Price Target of $216.
